productStatement: GrantLayer turns agentic grant workflows into verifiable institutional records.

runtimeModes.deploymentStyle: Local process with local-only binding and no external dependencies
runtimeModes.secretHandlingExpectation: Developer convenience; deterministic or placeholder secrets acceptable; no external secret manager required
runtimeModes.authExpectation: Simplified or bypassed authentication acceptable; local admin token reference may be used
runtimeModes.persistenceExpectation: SQLite or local file storage acceptable
runtimeModes.observabilityExpectation: Simplified logging acceptable; no structured observability required
runtimeModes.networkExposureExpectation: Local-only binding required; no external network exposure

runtimeModes.purpose: Deterministic automated verification in CI and local test suites
runtimeModes.deploymentStyle: Ephemeral process with isolated storage; no network exposure; self-contained
runtimeModes.secretHandlingExpectation: Synthetic secrets acceptable; mock secret sources; no real credentials
runtimeModes.authExpectation: Mock or bypassed authentication acceptable; fixture-based operator identities
runtimeModes.persistenceExpectation: SQLite in-memory or temporary files acceptable
runtimeModes.networkExposureExpectation: No network exposure; isolated process only

runtimeModes.purpose: Illustrative non-production walkthrough for integrators, partners, and stakeholders
runtimeModes.deploymentStyle: Local or temporary hosted instance with limited binding; demo fixtures preloaded
runtimeModes.secretHandlingExpectation: Placeholder secrets acceptable; no real credential values; labeled as synthetic
runtimeModes.authExpectation: Simplified auth acceptable; demo operator identity; no external identity provider
runtimeModes.persistenceExpectation: SQLite or local file storage acceptable
runtimeModes.networkExposureExpectation: Local-only or documented limited binding; no public exposure without constraints

runtimeModes.purpose: Controlled external technical integration with partner systems
runtimeModes.deploymentStyle: Partner-agreed host or container with documented constraints and limited network exposure
runtimeModes.secretHandlingExpectation: Partner-agreed secret source with documented constraints; no placeholder secrets
runtimeModes.persistenceExpectation: Partner-agreed database backend; documented durability expectations
runtimeModes.networkExposureExpectation: Limited and documented network exposure; partner-agreed access controls

runtimeModes.deploymentStyle: Production target layout without production data; full observability enabled; same package as production target
allowedDefaults: Same backend and auth as production target
runtimeModes.secretHandlingExpectation: Production-like secret manager or validated environment boundary; realistic but synthetic data
runtimeModes.authExpectation: Same auth target as production; realistic but synthetic identities
runtimeModes.persistenceExpectation: Same database backend as production target; test data isolated
runtimeModes.observabilityExpectation: Full observability stack enabled to validate production behavior
runtimeModes.networkExposureExpectation: Limited and documented network exposure; pre-production only

runtimeModes.deploymentStyle: Production-hardened deployment with explicit validated configuration, monitored observability, tested backup/restore, and documented runbooks
runtimeModes.secretHandlingExpectation: Explicit managed secret boundary; no placeholder or demo secrets; fail-closed if missing
runtimeModes.authExpectation: Explicit auth provider with validated operator identity; no demo tokens; fail-closed if missing
runtimeModes.persistenceExpectation: Explicit durable database backend with validated connection and durability guarantees
runtimeModes.observabilityExpectation: Explicit structured logging, metrics, alerting, and tracing configuration
runtimeModes.backupRestoreExpectation: Explicit automated backup schedule, retention policy, point-in-time recovery, and disaster runbooks
runtimeModes.networkExposureExpectation: Explicit host, port, TLS, and access restrictions; minimal exposure required for function

deploymentClaimRules: Production deployment claim is allowed only when runtime mode is explicitly set to production.
Production deployment claim requires all required deployment-critical configuration to be explicit, validated, and fail-closed if missing.
Production deployment claim requires explicit database/persistence backend with validated reachability.
Production deployment claim requires explicit secret source configuration with no placeholder or demo secrets.
Production deployment claim requires explicit auth/operator access configuration with no demo tokens.
Production deployment claim requires explicit evidence storage configuration with durable retention.
Production deployment claim requires explicit observability/logging configuration.
Production deployment claim requires explicit backup/restore plan with tested recovery procedures.
Production deployment claim requires explicit network binding/exposure rules with TLS.
Production deployment claim requires health/readiness checks implemented and returning accurate status.
Production deployment claim requires production hardening checklist completed and verified.
Production deployment claim requires no local/test/demo shortcuts, demo fixtures, or placeholder identities in the deployment package.

safeDefaults.productionRisk: SQLite lacks production durability, scaling, and concurrency guarantees.
Local binding does not validate network security or external access controls.
Demo fixtures are synthetic and must not be mixed with institutional data.
Placeholder identities provide no real authentication or authorization.
Simplified logging lacks structured output, metrics, and alerting required for production operations.
No backup/restore guarantee means data loss is possible without recovery path.
No secret manager means credentials are not managed, rotated, or audited.
Dry-run behavior does not validate real dependencies or secret resolution.

productionRequiredDeploymentConfiguratio: Explicit runtime mode set to production
Explicit database/persistence backend with validated reachability
Explicit secret source configuration with validated values
Explicit auth/operator access configuration with validated role mapping
Explicit evidence storage configuration with durable retention
Explicit observability/logging configuration with structured output
Explicit backup/restore plan with tested recovery procedures
Explicit network binding/exposure rules with TLS and access controls
Explicit health/readiness checks implemented and accurate
Explicit production hardening checklist completed and signed off
Fail-closed behavior for missing or invalid required configuration
